_comment: Single source of truth for cross-surface colour tokens.
Both dashboard_ui.py and mobile-app/tailwind.config.js read from here so
the dashboard and the PWA share the same palette. Edit values here once
and rebuild the PWA + reload the dashboard to see them update everywhere.
Token naming: semantic, not visual. 'bg' is the deepest background, 'card'
is one shade up for raised surfaces, 'border' is the dividing line, 'text'
is body copy, 'muted' is secondary copy, the four semantic colours map to
Dark palette is canonical (most users are in dark mode); light is mirrored

_status_emoji._comment: Standardised severity icons used in both dashboard banners and mobile cards.
